steps.title: Focus on the requested location
steps.content: The student wants to specify the location of Ctesiphon. The relevant notes say Ctesiphon was the capital of the Sasanian Empire and was located near present-day Baghdad, Iraq. A useful sentence must identify Ctesiphon and state where it was, rather than focusing on the empire's dates, size, or territory.

steps.title: Eliminate off-goal choices
steps.content: Choice A gives only the years when the Sasanian Empire began and ended, so it does not locate Ctesiphon. Choice B names Ctesiphon as the capital and includes the empire's size, but it still does not say where Ctesiphon was. Choice C describes the broad area the Sasanians controlled, including present-day Iran and Iraq, but it does not mention Ctesiphon or identify the city's location.

steps.title: Select the location sentence
steps.content: Choice D directly combines the useful details: Ctesiphon was the capital of the Sasanian Empire, and it was located near present-day Baghdad, Iraq. That fulfills the student's goal because it specifies the location of Ctesiphon. The answer is D.
